mano_cua.result_summary: 白板Eraser→Object模式切换存在双重bug：(1)视觉不一致：切换到Object模式后橡皮擦图标仍保持绿色高亮，两个图标同时显示激活状态；(2)功能不一致：切换到Object模式后点击画布对象仍被擦除而非选中，实际行为仍是Eraser模式。UI状态与实际行为完全不一致
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Both Object and Eraser icons show green highlight simultaneously. After switching to Object mode, clicking canvas objects erases them instead of selecting them. Tool state management is broken when switching from Eraser to other modes.
